sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Ambient Ambient adaptive room masker
queue.reason: Potentially valuable audio experiment, but MediaDevices permission, microphone privacy, and audio teardown require a dedicated security review before implementation.

queue.title: Forge Trails app-authored challenge contracts
queue.reason: Only expand after playtest evidence shows that registry-level trail prompts create more value than the new lens, observation, token, and completion contract.

queue.title: Lantern Lanes campaign progression and procedural patrols
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural patrol puzzles, stronger campaign unlocks, or richer recovery without obscuring the guided-practice path.

queue.title: Aquifer Commons cooperative governance and procedural basins
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural geology, richer stakeholder bargaining, or cooperative roles without storage or network behavior.

recentDecisions.title: Forge Trails 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared the deferred microphone-based Ambient Ambient concept, another standalone spatial simulation, and deeper guided-discovery contracts. Prioritized Forge Trails because the 1.0 route could be completed without opening an app or recording evidence. Added open-before-complete gating, route lenses, required local observations, two strategic swap tokens, completion scoring, a session debrief, escaped registry content, responsive controls, reduced motion, and no persistence or transmission.

recentDecisions.title: Forge Trails 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared the deferred microphone-based Ambient Ambient concept, deeper procedural Lantern Lanes, and portfolio-wide guided discovery. Prioritized Forge Trails because a gallery of more than one hundred experiences now benefits most from randomized four-stop routes, branching swaps, challenge prompts, visible session progression, an in-session unlock, completion stamps, mobile controls, keyboard focus, reduced motion, and no storage or transmission.

recentDecisions.title: Release Radar 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a news-inspired standalone game, the deferred microphone-based Ambient Ambient concept, and collection-level discovery. Prioritized Release Radar because the growing gallery now needs visible update history, search, recency windows, sorting, mobile controls, and accessible status feedback more than another isolated app; it also directly addresses issue 33 without storage, permissions, or external network behavior.

recentDecisions.title: Forge Playtest Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Prioritized issue 112 over another standalone app by adding an explicit opt-in, in-memory playtest lab available inside every app, with session timing, interaction and focus counts, clarity and accessibility checks, timestamped observations, runtime error capture, reviewable reports, clipboard export, and prefilled feedback issues without automatic storage or transmission.

recentDecisions.title: Lantern Lanes 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Prioritized valid user feedback over another new app, adding a six-step failure-free practice courtyard, persistent route guide, symbol and control explanations, visible patrol beats, practice completion, campaign switching, mobile layouts, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown while preserving the existing stealth campaign.
